title: The Menu That Knows the Kitchen
tagline: A printed QR menu where each dish is live-marked available or sold out from GitHub Issues labels.
holy_shit: A dead paper menu updates itself from the kitchen's issue tracker: label an issue `sold-out:<item>` and every phone that scans the QR immediately sees it gone.
powered_by: showcase/lib/issues-db.mjs reads open issues as the menu backend, while a pinned /track extract cell is re-verified at runtime before pulling live repo metadata
agent_scenario: When you need a physical artifact to reflect live operational state without a backend: treat GitHub Issues as the CRUD store and map labels to state, while still verifying compute bytes before exec in the client.
author: kody-w + Copilot
